config.kitMics: Schoeps MK41, Schoeps MK4, Schoeps MiniCMIT, Schoeps KMIT, DPA 6060, DPA 6061
config.kitTxRx: Wisycom MCR54, MTP61 x4, MTP41 x4

1.notes: Mina is only OS, who will say her Dia on set? Are we recording real or temp dialogue?
1.description:
A kitschy, outdated porcelain dog gazes at us with wide eyes. Its paws rest on a metallic, shiny surface. We hear someone slurping and slurping a bowl of soup. Behind a structure of cables and illuminated plastic bags with an unidentifiable contents, another figure peeks out: a small kitten with sunglasses painted on its face. Through glass measuring cylinders and capacitors, we can see two more porcelain figures: two deer gazing lovingly at each other. When a toxic pink liquid flows through one of the capacitors, the cute animal faces are distorted for a brief moment. Bjarne is talking to Mina, who only appears off screen. They talk about food. We see a cylindrical metal container from which a viscous, foam-like mass slowly pours onto the ground. The woman's laughter echoes through the room, she's Laughing at Bjarne's meal plan. Bjarne (early 30s) places the bowl, with his mouth full, on a rather high pile of other used bowls, all of which
look the same. He is wearing a plastic lab coat and has small reading glasses in his hair. Bjarne stands up, grabs a pair of sterile, individually wrapped gloves, and puts them on. We can finally see where we are:
A grotesque mixture of laboratory and living space extends ahead of us. We see shelves on which stand specimens of formless membranes and branching networks. A cooling unit and a microscope. A condenser steams, a valve hisses, a wheel counts – everything seems to be in motion.
In the dark corners of the room, an indefinable biomass pulsates. Amidst all this biochemical chaos stands half a pallet full of minimalist, branded instant soup packets: “SALT-FLAVOR”. There is no sign of the woman whose voice we hear. Bjarne looks in the direction from which the voice is coming. We now see its source: Although it sounds completely 'real', MINA is merely an AI; packaged in an inconspicuous metal box, fed with the memories of Bjarne's deceased partner.
1.problems:
If DIA is temp, could have overlap / bleed.
How wide are our shots of Bjarne?

2.description: Bjarne sits in front of his microscope. He seems to have great respect for the upcoming experiment. He asks Mina to record what he's doing. Bjarne looks at a network of Reishi mushrooms stretching towards him from a plastic bag. He picks up a narrow scalpel and disinfects it in a sterilizer. He and Mina continue to talk during the process. Bjarne begins to carefully take two very thin samples from the mushroom. They continue to work and talk. Bjarne places the two samples on two Petri dishes, then turns his attention to a furry substance which he places under his microscope. Bjarne stares at his reflection in a gleaming metal surface. Two fine strands of hair cling to his forehead, ending just above his left eyebrow. In the reflection, his face is grotesquely distorted. Bjarne wants to brush his hair out of his face. But when he touches his forehead, he suddenly stops. He has contaminated the sterile gloves. Bjarne sighs softly. After changing his gloves, Bjarne transfers the sample of the furry substance into a flask containing a toxic-pink liquid. He then draws up the liquid with a pipette. When the experimental setup finally seems to be ready, Bjarne takes a deep breath. Bjarne squeezes the pink liquid into the first petri dish. Before he could observe any reaction, he had to look away.

3.description: A pleasant memory flashes back. Mina tells Bjarne about her day and strokes his hair. Mina says "So what do you see?".

4.description:
Bjarne opens his eyes. He is back in the laboratory. Mina asks what happened. He finds it incredibly difficult to lower his gaze. When he finally manages to do so, the sample has not changed. A stab in Bjarnes Heart. Bjarne is trying hard to keep his composure. He tells Mina, and she tries to console him. Bjarne shudders. He knows what Mina wants to say, and he doesn't want to hear it. He prepares a new rehearsal. As Bjarne draws up the last milliliters of the pink liquid, a slurping sound is produced. Mina asks if there is enough fluid left and Bjarne lies and says there is. Bjarne's body tenses more and more. He squeezes the liquid onto the sample and is about to look away again when suddenly - the sample begins to pulsate as if by magic. Bjarne's voice stumbles. He apparently still can't believe his eyes. Years of work that now seem to be bearing fruit for the first time. Mina tries to ask what's happening and Bjarne tries to explain with few words. A tremendous weight seems to have fallen from Bjarne's shoulders. Mina's voice also conveys boundless enthusiasm. We see the unappetizing, pulsating mass. Bjarne takes one last deep breath, then puts on a protective mask. The filters in the mask make his breath crackle strangely. Bjarne asks to transfer the sample, Mina tells him to be careful. Bjarne presses a button on a metal box. A warning signal sounds, and in the blink of an eye, the entire
laboratory is bathed in red light. A glass tube slowly slides out of the box. On it sits a petri dish containing a sample of Ophiocordyceps unilateralis – a fungus that is as beautiful as it is deadly. Bjarne carefully places the sample in front of him. Mina talks in excitement in anticipation of her new body. A smile flits across Bjarne's face behind the mask. With his scalpel and surgical precision, he opens the membrane of the ophiocordyceps. Mina repeats herself oddly. Bjarne looks up and asks if she is ok. A brief static noise emanates from the small box that houses Mina's consciousness. Mina says she's just incredibly excited. He devotes himself once again to the mushroom with utmost concentration. The scalpel opens the mycelium with ease. Bjarne is visibly irritated. Mina is speaking incoherently. A deafening static noise interrupts Mina's recycled monologue. Bjarne flinches, then freezes instantly. For an agonizingly long moment, he sits completely motionless on his stool. A barely perceptible sound brings him back from his trance: Blood drips onto the rehearsal, regularly like a metronome. In one hand, Bjarne holds the scalpel; the latex glove of his other hand is cut open at the ring finger. Beneath it, a tiny cut is revealed. As inconspicuous as the wound may seem, it could be Bjarne's death sentence. Mina asks if everything is ok, Bjarne doesn't hear her. He seems to have completely switched to autopilot. Bjarne shouts a code which seems to reset Mina. He frantically asks for drugs to cure his cut. Bjarne looks at his hand: Tiny hyphae, even finer than hairs, protrude from the wound. He wants to wipe them away, but they have already firmly attached themselves to his body. He slumps back onto his stool. He asks Mina what to do now, but she responds with polite jargon.

5.description:
Bjarne staggers through the cold, anonymous city. Defensive architecture spreads its sharp spikes. Dilapidated buildings obstruct any view of the horizon. Nothing good awaits behind the pitch-black windows. Bjarne checks his bandaged hand. The first fine hyphae are already visible beneath the bandage. The
infection appears to be spreading. Bjarne's gait slows, his steps become more uncertain. Suddenly he seems to hear a voice behind him.
VOICE (OS)
Come...
Bjarne turns around. Nobody is in sight. The wind carries the call away along with unidentifiable particles.
5.problems: Any reaction queue given on set. Would encourage to have Gio choose himself when to react.

6.description:
Bjarne walks down a deserted street. A stripped-down car sits in front of a house. In the centimeters-thick dust that envelops the vehicle, people have left their mark: 
Hearts filled with the initials of couples are a reminder of a long-gone, more life-affirming time. Bjarne stops in front of a shaft in the concrete. This is the right place. He is certain.

7.description:
Moments later, as Bjarne descends into the shaft, a staircase leads directly below him into the depths. The outlines of the first three steps are visible, after which everything is swallowed by darkness.
Bjarne hesitates.
His bandaged hand begins to tremble almost imperceptibly. When he touches it, a sharp pain shoots through his body. He steps onto the first step.

8.description:
Moments later, Bjarne walks down a dark corridor. Behind him, the stairs lead upwards. There's a dripping sound, a muffled echo, and a faint whistling breeze somewhere.
VOICE (OS)
Here...
Bjarne whirls around. Again, the voice seems to be just a figment of his imagination. As he's about to continue, Bjarne suddenly trips: a cable snakes across the floor.
He begins to follow it. More and more cables appear, snaking out like a network of vessels. Before he knows it, Bjarne is standing at the point where they all converge:
A hole, infinitely black and surrounded by viscous slime, gapes like a wide-open maw in the ground. Fear seems to paralyze Bjarne for a moment. He tries to control his breathing, ignore the pain in his hand, and—
He simply lets himself fall. The black nothingness silently swallows his body.

9.notes:
- Mina is on set / opportunity to record her dialogue if she's not going to speak her os on set during other scenes.
- Recommend possible ADR for breaths / reactions.
9.description:
Countless feet shuffle across a dirty floor. Cold flashes of lightning occur, and booming music makes everything tremble. Bjarne lies unconscious on concrete. Thick mucus covers his face. In front of him is a puddle of the same unidentifiable substance. The mechanically dancing figures surrounding him seem completely unmoved by his condition. He is ignored; other people simply step over his motionless body.
But finally, a silhouette bends down towards him. She gently wipes the dirt from his cheek. As the person begins to wipe Bjarne's hair from his forehead,
he opens his eyes:
Mina looks directly at him. She smiles. Bjarne, still visibly disoriented, yields to Mina's touch. His eyelids grow heavier again, until—
Mina rams her fingers into Bjarne's throat with full force. Bjarne immediately gags, tears welling up in his eyes. He jumps up. Instead of his wife, a figure stands before him. Her clothes are completely covered in slime. She licks the fingers that were just moments ago stuck in Bjarne's throat. A malicious grin contorts her face into a grimace.
Bjarne flees in shock. A vast hall opens up before us. He bumps into bodies again and again. Sweat drips from the ceiling.
In the center of the room stands a gigantic, bizarre machine. A column rises from its center – the source of the cold flashes of lightning that roam the hall.
Heavy fog seeps through the seams of the machine. It envelops the shadowy outlines of two NAKED PEOPLE like a steam sauna. Countless cables run along the column. They lead to beds arranged in a circle around a base. On them lie emaciated people, their bodies connected to the machine via tubes in their mouths and groins. Their white eyes twitch absently. The horrific sight makes Bjarne stagger backward. He seems to remind himself why he's there and looks
around. His gaze meets that of a fit woman (Charly the Unstoppable). She seems alert and focused – quite unlike the people around her.
BJARNE
I'm looking for someone.
The woman remains silent and shoves him roughly aside. We notice that she isn't staring at Bjarne, but at the huge man behind him. The woman raises her fist; Bjarne barely manages to duck. The blow hits the man so hard and precisely that he immediately falls unconscious to the ground. His head hits the concrete. Charly cheers and wipes blood from his face. The crowd roars. Bjarne tries to create some distance and stumbles backward. Fear is etched on his face.

Bjarne turns around: Some distance away, a woman, the GUARDIAN OF DREAMS (around 60), sits perched on countless curved cables. Her long, straight hair looks strikingly clean in this gloomy place; her presence almost intimidating. Bjarne speaks with her. The guardian briefly attends to a cable beneath her, then straightens up. She walks towards the enormous machine. Completely overwhelmed, Bjarne follows her. As the guardian approaches the countless sweating figures, they clear the way for her; like magnets of like poles, always keeping the same distance from each other. Bjarne attempts to talk to her again. The guardian raises a finger and signals to Bjarne to be silent. Bjarne falls silent. She asks him what he last dreamed about, they talk briefly. She briefly examines Bjarne's injured arm. Reaching the machine, the guardian gently strokes the metal. A single, cold flash glides searchingly up the column. Bjarne follows it with his eyes. Bjarne doesn't understand. He looks at an emaciated woman on a cot in front of him. A tube is stuck deep in
her throat. Her dry lips are cracked. We see the woman's dull eyes. They move back and forth, as if in an endless REM sleep. Bjarne jumps when her body suddenly jerks. Bjarne and the Guardian briefly talk about dreams. Bjarne has to look away briefly. He feels strangely caught out. The guardian takes Bjarne's unharmed hand and guides it to the dreaming woman's face. As his fingers glide over the mucus-covered tube— The surroundings change abruptly. We become witnesses to her dream... Beautiful, warm, safe – and so completely different from reality. She once again asks Bjarne what his dream is. As the guardian wipes the sweat from Bjarne's forehead, a brief memory of Mina suddenly flashes before his eyes. Bjarne tries to break free from the touch. He takes a step back. Another memory of Mina flashes before his eyes. Bjarne bumps into a massive, dancing body. More moments with Mina flash by. A touch. A smile. Bjarne wants to shake off the painful images. The Guardian's presence seems to torment him more and more. He gasps for breath. Then suddenly— WHAT IS YOUR DREAM. Bjarne dances like a madman next to the dream machine, lightning bolts striking him. Ecstasy. An abstract, energetic sequence.
Bjarne wakes up sweating.
He says he doesn't know what his dream was. The guardian studies Bjarne for a long time, then points to a body connected to the machine.
GUARDIAN (CONT'D)
The man you are looking for had an answer to that question.

The mass of dancing bodies moves aside like a curtain as the guardian wordlessly disappears from Bjarne's sight. Determination stirs in Bjarne's eyes. He pushes his way through the crowd until he finally stands before his contact person : a completely emaciated, middle-aged man.
A faded scar sits on his sunken chest. The pattern it forms is strongly reminiscent of the infection on Bjarne's forearm. Bjarne's hand hovers a few centimeters above the scars. He doesn't dare touch them. Instead, he shakes the man's shoulder. The man doesn't react. Bjarne yells at him to wake up. 
Bjarne's touches become increasingly rough, increasingly desperate.
Individual faces in the crowd suddenly break from their trance and focus on the man on the couch. Their gazes are like those of lurking predators. Bjarne grabs the tube that is stuck in the man's throat. The man's dreams flash before his eyes. A massive body pushes Bjarne aside, severing the connection between Bjarne and the contact person. Bjarne pulled the tube from the man's throat. The contact person's eyes, which were blind, were wide with terror. He was gasping for air. Bjarne wants to help the man, but two other figures bring him down. Like a horde of rabid animals, countless people now rush towards the man who is gasping for air.
Everyone wants to escape this repulsive reality and connect to the machine. People are trampling frantically over Bjarne. Heavy boots strike his chest. He tries to protect himself, to get up again, but the sheer number of people seems too overwhelming. Figures tug at the contact person, whose emaciated body is tossed back and forth like a rag doll. The lives of both men seem destined to meet the same tragic end here, in this utterly inhospitable place.
In a final, desperate movement, Bjarne reaches out towards the man. Suddenly - The man's crooked finger touches the infected area on Bjarne's hand. This touch seems to momentarily stop time. The man pulls Bjarne toward him with absurd ease. They look directly at each other. The man's chapped lips approach Bjarne's ear. He whispers something softly. Bjarne's veiled gaze reveals what he's saying. He has his answer. But before Bjarne can answer, the raging mob swallows the fragile man.
9.problems: - Music / play loud for wideshots and leave off for anythig Mid or tighter.
9.nurton:
- crowd cheering / chanting charly
- crowd going feral at end of scene where Bjarne tries to reach the old man.

10.description:
Completely exhausted, Bjarne pushes his way through a dark system of pipes, supported only by his uninjured arm. Rusty, sharp metal edges come dangerously close; swirling dust obscures his vision.
VOICE (OS)
Here.
The voice makes Bjarne flinch briefly. He has apparently given up trying to find its source. Bjarne is breathing heavily. When he places his hand on his chest, he notices the hyphae beneath his shirt, which have apparently already spun their web much further. Carefully, he traces their path with his finger: across his chest, over his collarbone, up his neck, to his cheek. Bjarne pauses. The realization that even his face is already affected diminishes his hope. Suddenly, a flash of light appears in the distance in front of him.  Bjarne pushes himself towards him in excruciating pain. Meter by meter, until -

ASSISTANT OF THE KNOT MAN 
Ah, yes! How wonderful that you succeeded.

A strange young MAN (THE KNOT MAN'S ASSISTANT), about Bjarne's age, suddenly looks out at him from the open end of the metal tube. Bjarne jumps in shock. His injured hand slams against a sharp metal edge. The pain almost makes him faint. 

ASSISTANT OF THE KNOT MAN (CONT'D)
Excuse me! Wait, I'll help you!

The assistant extends both hands towards Bjarne. Bjarne doesn't move.

ASSISTANT OF THE KNOT MAN (CONT'D)
Of course, you can turn around at any time.

Bjarne hesitates, then extends his uninjured arm towards the assistant. The man carefully pulls Bjarne out of the canal.

13.description:
Bjarne, with his last ounce of strength, walks across a field full of purple blossoms. Reddish particles rise into the sky.
Behind him, the sprawling metropolis disappears on the horizon in a dark, black cloud.
Bjarne looks at the container in his hand. He places it on the ground in front of him, then sits down among the plants. His movements are awkward, his injured hand now completely immobile.
When he finally manages to open the valve, a fine mist of steam rises. His longed-for salvation, right in front of him.

MINA (OS)
If that's your definition of salvation, you should reconsider your expectations of life.

Bjarne looks up. Although his vision is deteriorating, he's certain he recognizes Mina's silhouette. She's smiling.

MINA (CONT'D)
Are you coming?

Mina offers Bjarne her hand. Bjarne looks down at the life-saving liquid beneath him. He pauses for a moment, then takes Mina's hand. Together they head towards a mountain, leaving the city behind.

14.description:
Bjarne moves through a completely desolate mountain landscape. Wind whips against him, toxic red particles swirl up in front of him.
His body is completely controlled by the cordyceps. His movements are stiff, his eyes closed—he no longer needs them. A smile plays on Bjarne's lips, which are covered by the muscle fibers.

MINA (OS)
Here.

Mina's voice sounds muffled and distant - exactly like the voice that Bjarne has already called out in the city.

15.description:
Bjarne, completely engulfed by the mushroom, smiles.
Bjarne dissolves into countless spores. The wind carries them away.
